mapper.select: SELECT * FROM scenic_spot ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM scenic_spot WHERE status='OPEN' ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO scenic_spot (id, name, description, address, city, opening_hours, contact_phone, cover_image, images, min_price, status) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{address}, #{city}, #{openingHours}, #{contactPhone}, #{coverImage}, #{images}, #{minPrice}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE scenic_spot SET status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE scenic_spot SET id = id - 1 WHERE id > #{afterId}
UPDATE scenic_spot SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id=#{id}
